title: Big Rod Energy
description: A little client-sided mod to make fishing rods look bigger
body:
A little client-sided mod, that makes fishing rod bigger in your hand while reusing the old textures as inventory sprites.![old rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e317445a8ef491c28a87dff214bb934f082151b5_0.webp)
![new rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d01e3403642d7f9888bb47cfab99956010f5441f_0.webp)
